3069860.name: Kawaii Slime
3069860.description: Welcome to Kawaii Slime, the enchanting world where adorable slime monsters are waiting to be discovered. You can play aggressively by clicking your way to obtaining a wide variety of adorable slimes or you can take the relaxed pace of being idle and do absolutely nothing. Slimes of all colors, shapes, and sizes are waiting to be discovered by you. Can you collect all the slimes in this new idle game? Become the envy of your friends by obtaining limited time versions of the cute and squishy creatures.
